personal.name: Dharanidharan A
personal.title: Creative Frontend Developer & AI Engineer
personal.summary: Adaptable and detail-oriented Computer Science professional with strong foundations in software systems, AI, databases, and full-stack development. Passionate about creating intelligent applications and modern web experiences.

education.details: Specialized in Artificial Intelligence, Advanced Web Technologies, and Cloud Databases. Developed deep learning models for NLP tasks.
Completed coursework in Software Engineering, Database Management Systems, Data Structures, and Python Programming.

projects.title: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Using Deep Learning
projects.overview: A state-of-the-art deep learning model leveraging transformers (BERT, DistilBERT, XLM-RoBERTa) to analyze sentiment across multiple modalities—specifically fusing text embeddings and emoji representations on social media inputs for richer contextual analysis.
features: Hybrid text and emoji multimodal fusion pipeline
High-accuracy predictions on social media datasets

projects.title: Inventory Management System
projects.overview: A modern, high-performance SaaS web application that enables businesses to track inventory levels, sales metrics, and supply chains. Integrated with role-based authentication and interactive dashboard reports.
features: Real-time stock alerts and automatic reordering notifications
Interactive dashboard displaying sales, expenses, and profit margins
Secure role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Staff)
Full CSV/PDF export capabilities for audits

projects.title: Employee Management System
projects.overview: An enterprise-grade platform built to streamline HR processes, automate payroll, track daily attendance, manage leaf logs, and monitor performance evaluations with a secure database backend.
features: Automated payroll calculation with tax deductions and bonuses
Live check-in/out attendance logging with location mapping
Annual performance evaluation scoring and manager reviews

publication.title: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis using Deep Learning and Transformers on Textual and Emojis based Social Media Inputs
publication.abstract: Proposed and implemented a novel sentiment classification model integrating dual-channel processing of textual content and contextual emojis, showing a 4.5% accuracy increase over traditional single-channel text classifiers.
